intro: AccountCcy.com may be considered for strategic acquisition only where an institutional buyer understands the asset as a governed reference asset and category-language surface for enterprise finance.
acquisition_doctrine: The buyer is not acquiring an isolated web property. The buyer is acquiring a governed language surface around account currency control, currency-state governance, and the chain of custody for monetary truth.
asset_included_title: The asset is structured as governed category infrastructure.
asset_included_body: AccountCcy.com combines a precise domain, original doctrine, a published CCY State Chain, a Currency State Control Framework, a controlled glossary, reference pages, quality gates, and a diagnostic layer.

The acquisition logic is strongest for organizations that already serve controllers, CFO teams, ERP architects, close operations, reconciliation, consolidation, reporting, audit technology, finance transformation, or enterprise finance education.
No acquisition language should weaken the asset. The public posture remains restrained, institutional, and patient.

asset_included_cards.label: Domain thesis
asset_included_cards.title: A name attached to a precise custody category.
asset_included_cards.body: AccountCcy is positioned around monetary truth custody and account currency control rather than generic multi-currency content.

asset_included_cards.label: Reference system
asset_included_cards.title: Doctrine, framework, glossary, and state chain.
asset_included_cards.body: The asset publishes a controlled vocabulary for monetary truth custody across enterprise finance systems.

asset_included_cards.label: Operational layer
asset_included_cards.title: Diagnostic surface and future report path.
asset_included_cards.body: The diagnostic converts the thesis into a structured maturity output without cheapening authority.

asset_included_cards.label: SEO discipline
asset_included_cards.title: Professional intent, not mass-market traffic.
asset_included_cards.body: Published pages target definition, framework, ERP control, close, reconciliation, reporting, consolidation, and audit evidence use cases.

asset_included_cards.label: Governance
asset_included_cards.title: Quality gates protect credibility.
asset_included_cards.body: The asset rejects unsupported claims, vendor affiliation confusion, weak monetization, and temporary filler pages.

asset_included_cards.label: Buyer logic
asset_included_cards.title: Harder to replicate than an isolated tool.
asset_included_cards.body: A buyer can build a feature; it is harder to build the same name, language, internal graph, and accumulated governance history.

buyer_title: Aligned buyers are those who can extend the custody language responsibly.
buyer_intro: Strategic fit matters more than broad interest. AccountCcy.com is best matched with organizations that can extend the framework into trusted software, advisory, reporting, consolidation, assurance, education, or finance transformation workflows without turning the asset into hype or advice.

buyer_cards.label: Financial close platforms
buyer_cards.title: Close evidence and custody workflow context.
buyer_cards.body: Close platforms can use the language to frame how monetary truth moves from balances and reconciliations into defensible close artifacts.

buyer_cards.label: Reconciliation systems
buyer_cards.title: Currency-state exception language.
buyer_cards.body: Reconciliation systems can connect breaks, populations, ownership, and evidence to the currency state where ambiguity entered.

buyer_cards.label: Consolidation and reporting software
buyer_cards.title: Entity proof to group presentation.
buyer_cards.body: Consolidation and reporting platforms can use the framework to distinguish ledger custody, reporting currency, consolidation currency, and audit reality.

buyer_cards.label: ERP implementation networks
buyer_cards.title: Configuration vocabulary without vendor claims.
buyer_cards.body: ERP implementation networks can use the reference language to discuss account currency discipline, configuration risk, and control boundaries in a vendor-neutral way.

buyer_cards.label: CFO advisory
buyer_cards.title: Executive vocabulary for finance transformation.
buyer_cards.body: CFO advisory and finance transformation firms can anchor close, reporting, and evidence discussions in controlled custody language.

buyer_cards.label: Audit technology and education
buyer_cards.title: Evidence language and professional learning.
buyer_cards.body: Audit technology, assurance enablement, and finance education providers can extend the custody model into learning, review, and evidence workflows while preserving claim boundaries.

inquiry_title: Inquiry requires context, seriousness, and institutional alignment.
inquiry_body: A credible inquiry should identify the organization, intended strategic use, relationship to enterprise finance, and whether the interest concerns acquisition, licensing, partnership, or a governed commercial discussion. No public valuation anchor is provided.
